sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54913" key="kata/pristos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατά-πριστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n54913.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sawn</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐλέφας</foreign> prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:63:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">63.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
